name: remember
description: Transforms lessons learned into domain-organized memory instructions (global or workspace).
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 remember 相關工作
幫我啟用 remember 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 remember

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the remember skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
